form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 30-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 3 len at Taruma March 7 over 1800m defeating Indian Vip with 57kg at $2. The run before that 2nd in a small field at Taruma on February 8 over 2000m, in the wet; 0.3 len behind Trinca Ferro with 57kg at $8.30. Winning chance again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 4th of 11 at this track on March 8 over 2000m, 2 len behind Spartan carrying 57kg at $16.30.
